label: Grounding Lattice Cell
description: Grounding Lattice Cell serves as a narrow sleeping chamber cut into the Temple of the Rift-Vigil’s basalt mass, its walls left rough but sealed with soot-dark resin against Ashenward’s abrasive air. A low stone bunk and recessed shelf are built directly into the masonry, reducing loose furnishings that collect ash and conductive grit. Overhead, a copper grounding grid is fastened to the vault and tied into the temple’s broader lattices, its junctions capped in ceramic to resist storm-surge arcing. Auroral light filters through a slit of auroraglass, laying violet bands across the floor while heavy insulation panels deaden vox bleed and distant thunder.
